feat.name: Leap and Fire
feat.text: You're quick enough to line up a shot even while diving to the ground. When you use your Hit the Dirt! reaction, at any point during your Leap you can also make a ranged Strike with a loaded firearm or crossbow, targeting the creature whose attack triggered the reaction.

traits.name: Gunslinger
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the gunslinger class.
